narrative: Australia business confidence plunges to -29 as Iran war shock hits outlook, driving AUD/USD lower to 0.7085; EUR/USD holds at 1.1763 as ECB-USD yield differential limits upside. USD/JPY retreats to 159.18, while gold is higher +0.45% on safe-haven demand amid elevated VIX at 19.1 and equities higher +1.02%. DXY is steady, reflecting mixed market sentiment.
